headline: Evaluating AES Corp (AES) Valuation As Mixed Returns Stir Fresh Investor Interest
summary: Why AES (AES) Is Drawing Investor Attention Now AES (AES) has been catching investor interest after recent share performance data showed a mixed picture, with a small gain over the past week alongside modest declines over the month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for AES. At a share price of $14.20, AES has seen short-term share price momentum soften. However, the 1-year total shareholder return of 20.29% contrasts with weaker 3- and 5-year total shareholder returns of 32.40% and...
